Row.Text: The Trade Headquarters adds +10 [ICON_SWAP] Trade Routes, +30 [ICON_GOLD] Gold, +50% [ICON_GOLD] Gold, and +10 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] Happiness to your city. A Market must be built before the Trade Headquarters!

The Trade Headquarters adds +10 [ICON_SWAP] Trade Routes, +30 [ICON_GOLD] Gold, +50% [ICON_GOLD] Gold, and +10 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] Happiness to your city. A Market must be built before the Trade Headquarters!

The Trade Headquarters adds +10 [ICON_SWAP] Trade Routes, +30 [ICON_GOLD] Gold, +50% [ICON_GOLD] Gold, and +10 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] Happiness to your city. A Market must be built before the Trade Headquarters!
